prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Monte Carlo simulation (100,000 runs) using a Geometric Brownian Motion model. Historical daily returns for MCD over the last five years (2019-06-01 to 2024-06-01) were analyzed to estimate the mean daily return (0.000397) and daily volatility (0.0135). These parameters were used to simulate 18 days of future price movements. The point estimate is the average of the simulated final prices, and the confidence intervals are derived from the percentiles of these simulated prices. This method assumes that future price movements will statistically resemble past movements.
